element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundational mechanic present from start; power-up bar absent means progression through collecting bubbles
Dual-button mechanic introduces risk/reward: holding both buttons powers down shots
Rewards pattern recognition; yields red bubbles (shot/bomb power-up)
Introduces timing-based destruction for power-ups; adds environmental hazard layer
Spatial awareness mechanic; third power-up source requiring environmental interaction
Primary offensive progression; loss of ship resets to minimum power

element_introduction_order.element: Blue bubble (shield regenerate and level up)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Defensive progression; enables sustained play through hit absorption
Resource management; randomized reward creates tension
Clutch mechanic for high-danger moments; alternative laser beam power grants sustained offense
Weapon variety; tactical switching between bombs and side lasers adds complexity
Meta-level choice; convergence at stages L, N, O with distinct endings
Three divergent final bosses; checkpoint system allows retry from pre-boss state

typical_relief_triggers: Activating screen-clear power-up during heavy enemy density
typical_tension_triggers: Meteor rain sequences (time-pressure on flashing meteors)
Loss of ship (power-down reset, checkpoint respawn)
Power-up bar absence (permanent loss on destruction)
Boss encounters at stages L, N, O
Dual-button holding penalty (shot power reduction while maintaining bomb readiness)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based tension with progressive complexity; early stages establish mechanics through safe introduction of power-up sources; mid-game adds weapon variety and navigation choice; late-game (stages L/N/O) forces convergence to final bosses with high-stakes no-bar progression system

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Caged power-ups on floor/ceiling require spatial scanning; futuristic cage placement telegraphs optional destruction zones

difficulty_curve.early_game: Safe introduction of three power-up acquisition methods (formations, meteor rain, cages); checkpoint system allows learning without penalty; three ship choice provides player agency
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Environmental complexity increases via meteor sequences; weapon switching (R button) adds tactical depth; stage branching introduces navigation choice; power-ups remain accessible
difficulty_curve.late_game: Convergence at three final stages (L, N, O); each boss represents distinct difficulty/pattern; permanent power loss on ship destruction becomes critical without power-up bar; checkpoint-before-boss mitigates frustration but raises stakes
notable_spikes: Transition to branching paths (stages K→L/N/O) - navigation choice creates divergent difficulty
Power-down spiral potential - loss of ship without bar means significant offense regression

notable_level_patterns.description: Stages A-K establish all core mechanics (shots, bombs, three power-up sources, weapon switching) with increasing environmental density but consistent safe-to-moderate difficulty
15-stage structure with forward/up path choices until convergence at exactly three final stages (L, N, O), each containing unique boss and ending; creates replayability without stage repetition
Ship loss during boss returns to checkpoint before boss appearance, not stage start; removes backtracking penalty while maintaining boss retry tension
